raw_consumer_statement:
This item was canceled within minutes of placing the order. XXXX refused to cancel the order, stating it had already been processed for shipping, and there was no way to stop it. 
I filed a dispute with them on XX/XX/XXXX. They have not responded, they have now put my account into a late payment status.

I do not have this item, they refuse to cancel it. They want me to have it delivered, then return it. They are rude, and refuse to work with me. They do not respond to the dispute.
